testcase.name: Admin Dashboard › Dashboard Overview › should display admin dashboard with statistics
Admin Dashboard › Dashboard Overview › should show recent activity feed
Admin Dashboard › Dashboard Overview › should navigate to different admin sections
Admin Dashboard › Session Management › should display list of all sessions
Admin Dashboard › Session Management › should filter sessions by status
Admin Dashboard › Session Management › should search sessions by user email
Admin Dashboard › Session Management › should view session details
Admin Dashboard › Session Management › should export sessions to CSV
Admin Dashboard › Approval Workflow › should display pending approvals list
Admin Dashboard › Approval Workflow › should view approval request details
Admin Dashboard › Approval Workflow › should approve a pending request
Admin Dashboard › Approval Workflow › should reject a pending request
Admin Dashboard › Approval Workflow › should filter approvals by type
Admin Dashboard › User Management › should display users list
Admin Dashboard › User Management › should search users by email
Admin Dashboard › User Management › should view user details
Admin Dashboard › User Management › should change user role
Admin Dashboard › User Management › should deactivate user account
Admin Dashboard › User Management › should filter users by role
Admin Dashboard › Audit Log › should display audit log
Admin Dashboard › Audit Log › should filter audit log by action type
Admin Dashboard › Audit Log › should filter audit log by date range
Admin Dashboard › Audit Log › should export audit log
Admin Dashboard › System Settings › should display system settings
Admin Dashboard › System Settings › should update email settings
Admin Dashboard › System Settings › should test email configuration
Admin Dashboard › Access Control › should deny access to non-admin users
Admin Dashboard › Access Control › should allow moderator limited access
User Login Flow › should display login form with all required fields
User Login Flow › should successfully login with valid credentials
User Login Flow › should show error for invalid credentials
User Login Flow › should show error for non-existent email
User Login Flow › should validate email format
User Login Flow › should require password field
User Login Flow › should navigate to registration page
User Login Flow › should navigate to forgot password page
User Login Flow › should show remember me option
Session Management › should persist session after page reload
Session Management › should logout successfully
Session Management › should redirect to login when accessing protected route without auth
Session Management › should redirect to intended page after login
Session Management › should display user information in header
Session Management › should handle session expiration gracefully
Password Reset Flow › should display password reset form
Password Reset Flow › should send password reset email
Password Reset Flow › should validate email format for reset
Password Reset Flow › should navigate back to login
Password Reset Flow › should handle reset token flow
Password Reset Flow › should validate new password requirements
Password Reset Flow › should handle invalid reset token
Admin Login › should allow admin to access admin panel
Admin Login › should deny regular user from admin panel
User Registration › should display registration form
User Registration › should validate required fields
User Registration › should validate email format
User Registration › should validate password strength
User Registration › should register new user successfully
User Registration › should show error for duplicate email
User Registration › should have link to login page
User Login › should display login form
User Login › should validate required fields
User Login › should show error for invalid credentials
User Login › should login successfully with valid credentials
User Login › should have forgot password link
User Login › should have link to register page
User Logout › should logout successfully
Protected Routes › should redirect unauthenticated users to login
Protected Routes › should allow authenticated users to access protected routes
Session Persistence › should maintain session after page reload
Chat Interface › should display chat interface
Chat Interface › should show message input field
Chat Interface › should show send button
Chat Interface › should display initial AI greeting
Sending Messages › should send a message
Sending Messages › should receive AI response
Sending Messages › should send message with Enter key
Sending Messages › should disable input while AI is responding
Message History › should persist message history on reload
Message History › should show conversation thread
Message Limit › should display message limit indicator
Message Limit › should warn when approaching limit
Fact Extraction Display › should display extracted facts panel
Quality Score Updates › should show quality score indicator
Error Handling › should handle empty message gracefully
Error Handling › should show error state on network failure
Streaming Response › should show typing/streaming indicator
Document Generation Flow › Document Menu › should display available document types
Document Generation Flow › Document Menu › should show pricing for document types
Document Generation Flow › Document Menu › should show quality level options
Document Generation Flow › Document Menu › should indicate document availability based on facts
Document Generation Flow › Document Selection › should be able to select a document type
Document Generation Flow › Document Selection › should be able to select quality level
Document Generation Flow › Document Selection › should show price calculation based on quality
Document Generation Flow › Checkout Flow › should display checkout button
Document Generation Flow › Checkout Flow › should navigate to payment page on checkout
Document Generation Flow › Generated Documents › should display list of purchased documents
Document Generation Flow › Generated Documents › should have download button for generated documents
Document Preview › should display document preview
Document Formats › should offer multiple download formats (PDF, DOCX)
Document Generation Flow › Technology Roadmap Generation › should display document generation page
Document Generation Flow › Technology Roadmap Generation › should show available document templates
Document Generation Flow › Technology Roadmap Generation › should generate Technology Roadmap document
Document Generation Flow › Technology Roadmap Generation › should download generated Technology Roadmap
Document Generation Flow › Business Plan Generation › should generate Business Plan document
Document Generation Flow › Business Plan Generation › should include financial projections in Business Plan
Document Generation Flow › Business Plan Generation › should select different output formats
Document Generation Flow › Policy Pack Generation › should generate Policy Pack with all policies
Document Generation Flow › Policy Pack Generation › should select individual policies for generation
Document Generation Flow › Policy Pack Generation › should include control mappings in Policy Pack
Document Generation Flow › Full Deliverables ZIP › should generate full deliverables package
Document Generation Flow › Full Deliverables ZIP › should download full deliverables as ZIP
Document Generation Flow › Full Deliverables ZIP › should show deliverables contents before download
Document Generation Flow › Full Deliverables ZIP › should customize deliverables package contents
Document Generation Flow › Document Preview › should preview document before download
Document Generation Flow › Document Preview › should navigate through multi-page preview
Document Generation Flow › Document Preview › should close preview modal
Document Generation Flow › Generation History › should display generation history
Document Generation Flow › Generation History › should re-download previously generated document
Document Generation Flow › Generation History › should filter generation history by document type
Document Generation Flow › Generation History › should delete generation history item
Document Generation Flow › Error Handling › should show error when generation fails
Document Generation Flow › Error Handling › should allow retry after generation failure
Document Generation Flow › Error Handling › should validate required questionnaire completion
Document Generation Flow › Template Customization › should customize document title
Document Generation Flow › Template Customization › should add custom sections to document
Document Generation Flow › Template Customization › should select document branding options
Payment Flow › Billing Page › should display current subscription status
Payment Flow › Billing Page › should show subscription details for paid users
Payment Flow › Billing Page › should display upgrade options for free users
Payment Flow › Upgrade Flow › should display pricing page with all tiers
Payment Flow › Upgrade Flow › should show feature comparison table
Payment Flow › Upgrade Flow › should initiate upgrade to Professional plan
Payment Flow › Upgrade Flow › should toggle between monthly and yearly billing
Payment Flow › Checkout Process › should display Stripe payment form
Payment Flow › Checkout Process › should complete payment with test card
Payment Flow › Checkout Process › should handle declined card gracefully
Payment Flow › Checkout Process › should validate required fields
Payment Flow › Checkout Process › should apply coupon code
Payment Flow › Checkout Process › should handle invalid coupon code
Payment Flow › Subscription Management › should display manage subscription options
Payment Flow › Subscription Management › should update payment method
Payment Flow › Subscription Management › should change billing cycle
Payment Flow › Subscription Management › should cancel subscription with confirmation
Payment Flow › Subscription Management › should show downgrade options
Payment Flow › Invoice History › should display invoice history
Payment Flow › Invoice History › should download invoice PDF
Payment Flow › Invoice History › should filter invoices by date
Payment Flow › Invoice History › should view invoice details
Payment Flow › Feature Gating › should show upgrade prompt for premium features on free plan
Payment Flow › Feature Gating › should allow access to features based on subscription tier
Payment Flow › Feature Gating › should show usage limits for current plan
Payment Flow › Enterprise Contact › should display enterprise contact form
Payment Flow › Enterprise Contact › should submit enterprise inquiry
Payment Flow › Payment Error Recovery › should handle payment failure and allow retry
Payment Flow › Payment Error Recovery › should handle 3D Secure authentication
Adaptive Logic Flow › should show conditional question when trigger condition is met
Adaptive Logic Flow › should skip conditional question when trigger condition is not met
Adaptive Logic Flow › should hide entire section based on branching logic
Adaptive Logic Flow › should show section when qualifying score is reached
Adaptive Logic Flow › should update progress correctly when questions are skipped
Adaptive Logic Flow › should handle nested conditional logic
Adaptive Logic Flow › should respect dimension-based visibility rules
Adaptive Logic Flow › should maintain skip state on navigation back
Adaptive Logic Flow › should display skip reason indicator
Adaptive Logic Flow › should handle multiple skip conditions (AND logic)
Adaptive Logic Flow › should handle multiple skip conditions (OR logic)
Section Visibility › should show section list with visibility indicators
Section Visibility › should update section visibility in real-time
Section Visibility › should complete questionnaire when all visible questions are answered
Adaptive Score Impact › should reflect skipped questions in final score calculation
Adaptive Score Impact › should show N/A for skipped dimension sections
Complete Questionnaire Flow › should display questionnaire list
Complete Questionnaire Flow › should start a new questionnaire session
Complete Questionnaire Flow › should display progress counters
Complete Questionnaire Flow › should answer BOOLEAN question type
Complete Questionnaire Flow › should answer SCALE question type (1-5)
Complete Questionnaire Flow › should answer TEXT question type
Complete Questionnaire Flow › should answer SINGLE_CHOICE question type

Complete Questionnaire Flow › should answer NUMBER question type

Complete Questionnaire Flow › should skip optional questions
Complete Questionnaire Flow › should show best practice guidance
Complete Questionnaire Flow › should update progress as questions are answered
Questionnaire Completion › should show completion screen when all questions answered
Questionnaire Completion › should display score after completion
Questionnaire Completion › should show score breakdown by dimension
Questionnaire Completion › should allow viewing heatmap
Questionnaire Completion › should save progress and resume later
Question Validation › should validate required questions
Question Validation › should validate percentage range (0-100)
Question Validation › should validate text minimum length
